data.title: Whale Trader AguilaTrades Increases BTC Position to $160 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa) has reported that whale contract trader AguilaTrades has increased their BTC position to $160 million. As of early today, the trader holds 1,500 BTC with an entry price of $107,288.9 and a liquidation price of $101,730. The current unrealized loss stands at $635,000.

data.title: A whale withdrew 1,888 ETH from Binance and pledged it, worth $4.56 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the giant whale/institution 0x1fc...FAEd5 withdrew 1,888 ETH (US$4.56 million) 20 minutes ago and then deposited it into ETH2.0 for pledge. The address has accumulated 5,089 ETH in the past week, with a total value of US$12.65 million and an average price of US$2,486.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with Notable Gains and Losses
data.description:
According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market experienced varied movements on June 28, with several tokens showing significant gains and others facing declines. Leading the day's gains, token W is currently priced at $0.0683, marking a 7.82% increase. XRP follows with a price of $2.175, up by 3.69%. ZRO is reported at $1.75, showing a 1.63% rise, while CFX is at $0.0718, increasing by 1.60%. NEAR also saw a positive movement, priced at $2.12 with a 1.48% gain.

Conversely, some tokens experienced notable losses. LPT is currently priced at $5.947, reflecting a 7.03% decrease. AAVE stands at $257.72, down by 2.73%. ARB is reported at $0.306, showing a 1.79% decline, while RPL is priced at $4.876, decreasing by 1.77%. ILV also saw a downturn, priced at $10.22 with a 1.64% drop.

data.title: The VIRTUAL whale that previously received a $1.61 million airdrop sold its positions but still lost $6.54 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale/institution that previously used 10 million USDC to buy VIRTUAL, after receiving a VVV airdrop worth 1.61 million US dollars, ended up losing 6.54 million US dollars. The operation process is as follows: In December last year, he spent 10 million USDC to buy 4.251 million VIRTUAL at an average price of 2.35 US dollars; In January, he received an airdrop of 101,000 VVVs for holding a large number of VIRTUALs, and then sold the airdrops for 1.61 million USDC; In March, 4.251 million VIRTUALs were sold at an average price of 0.56 US dollars. Today, he cleared the address and transferred 3.46 million USDC to Coinbase.

data.title: Ripple abandons cross-appeal against SEC and accepts $125 million fine, and the long-term legal battle may come to an end
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ripple Labs announced that it would withdraw its cross-appeal against the U.S. SEC and would implement the relevant provisions of the previous court ruling. This decision means that the multiple rounds of legal battles since the SEC filed a lawsuit against Ripple in 2019 may come to an end.
Giving up the appeal means that Ripple will accept the initial $125 million civil penalty and may retain a permanent ban. In 2023, Judge Torres ruled that XRP sales to retail investors on public exchanges did not constitute securities transactions, but sales to institutional investors violated securities laws. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ripple CEO Announces End to SEC Legal Battle
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Ripple Labs CEO Brad Garlinghouse announced on social media that the company will not pursue a cross-appeal in its case with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Garlinghouse stated that Ripple is moving on from this chapter to focus on building the Internet of Value, emphasizing that the broader strategy is set.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that U.S. District Judge Analisa Torres in the Southern District of New York rejected a settlement proposal from both the SEC and Ripple for the second time. The proposal aimed to reduce the fine to $50 million and lift a permanent injunction. However, the judge maintained that there is still a possibility of Ripple violating regulations again, necessitating the continuation of the injunction.

data.title: Texas Police Retrieve $32,000 from Bitcoin ATM Amid Legal Concerns
data.description:
According to PANews, Texas police recently used power tools to extract $32,000 from a Bitcoin Depot ATM. Chris Ryan, Chief Legal Officer of Bitcoin Depot, criticized the action as potentially unlawful and an overreach by U.S. law enforcement. Scott Buchanan, the company's Chief Operating Officer, stated that the machine was irreparably damaged and would need complete replacement due to the physical breach.

A report from the FBI highlighted that in 2024, Americans lost at least $247 million through cryptocurrency self-service terminals, marking a 31% increase from 2023. The incident raises questions about the legality and ethics of law enforcement's approach to handling cryptocurrency-related cases.

data.title: Decentralized Oracle Network Chainlink Continues Run As Most-Developed Project in the DeFi Sector: Santiment
data.description:
The decentralized oracle network Chainlink (LINK) continues to dominate crypto’s decentralized finance (DeFi) sector in terms of development activity, according to the analytics firm Santiment. Santiment notes in a new post on the social media platform X that Chainlink registered 363. 73 notable GitHub events in the past 30 days
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/27/decentralized-oracle-network-chainlink-continues-run-as-most-developed-project-in-the-defi-sector-santiment/

data.title: New York asset management company KraneShares applies to list Coinbase 50 index ETF
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News KraneShares, an asset management company focusing on exchange-traded funds (ETFs), is seeking to list a "Coinbase 50 Index ETF" that will track the 50 largest digital assets by market capitalization. The company submitted registration documents to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Friday.
The Coinbase 50 Index, launched at the end of 2024, is an index product regulated by the largest cryptocurrency exchange in the United States. The weight of the index is re-evaluated every quarter, and its three major holdings are currently 50% of Bitcoin, about 21% of ETH, and 9% of XRP. (THE BLOCK)

data.title: U.S. Ends Trade Talks with Canada Over Digital Tax Dispute
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced on social media on June 27 that the United States has learned of Canada's decision to impose a digital services tax on American technology companies. Trump described this move as a "direct and blatant attack" on the United States, suggesting that Canada is following the European Union's example. In response to this unexpected tax, Trump declared the immediate termination of all trade negotiations with Canada. The United States will inform Canada of the tariffs applicable to trade with the U.S. within the next seven days.
